evidence_alignment.reason: All selected platform recommendations point back to supported Lane A card IDs.

message_clarity.reason: The brief contains a clear thesis, reusable proof points, and a concrete CTA.

platform_fit.reason: The generator can map the source asset to supported signal-card selections on each requested platform.

production_efficiency.reason: A text-first source asset can be rewritten into multiple platform variants with limited structural risk.

experimentation_readiness.reason: The brief includes constraints, notes, and an explicit operator goal that can be turned into manual test rules.

uncertainty_note: Trend inputs remain assumption-labeled in R16, so the scorecard is deterministic planning support rather than a market-truth predictor.
